questions.question: Describe the difference between a convolutional layer and a fully connected layer in a deep neural network. Provide an example of when you would use each type of layer.
What is the purpose of regularization techniques in supervised deep learning? Give an example of a regularization technique and explain how it works.

A deep neural network is trained to classify images into two categories. The network achieves a high accuracy on the training set but performs poorly on the test set. What could be the reason for this discrepancy?
